sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107290" key="u(perasxhmone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερασχημονέω</orth>, <sense id="n107290.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">behave with great unseemliness,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.45f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
